name: Mixer B2000
description: A state-of-the-art internal mixer capable of processing up to 500kg batches of rubber compound. Features advanced temperature control and rotor design to ensure consistent dispersion of fillers and additives. It's integrated with an automated weighing and feeding system, reducing human error and improving cycle times to approximately 5 minutes per batch. Real-time viscosity monitoring provides critical process feedback for quality control.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site B/Mixing Department/Mixer B2000
full_text: Mixer B2000 - A state-of-the-art internal mixer capable of processing up to 500kg batches of rubber compound. Features advanced temperature control and rotor design to ensure consistent dispersion of fillers and additives. It's integrated with an automated weighing and feeding system, reducing human error and improving cycle times to approximately 5 minutes per batch. Real-time viscosity monitoring provides critical process feedback for quality control.

name: Curing Press Array L3
description: A bank of twelve hydraulic curing presses operating on Production Line 3. Each press is individually programmable to handle different tire sizes and curing recipes, applying precise temperature, pressure, and dwell times. They are equipped with smart sensors for predictive maintenance and real-time anomaly detection, minimizing downtime and ensuring optimal vulcanization. This array is a critical bottleneck, operating continuously.

full_text: Curing Press Array L3 - A bank of twelve hydraulic curing presses operating on Production Line 3. Each press is individually programmable to handle different tire sizes and curing recipes, applying precise temperature, pressure, and dwell times. They are equipped with smart sensors for predictive maintenance and real-time anomaly detection, minimizing downtime and ensuring optimal vulcanization. This array is a critical bottleneck, operating continuously.

name: Smart Tire Machine P1
description: A highly automated, modular tire building machine designed for rapid changeovers between different tire specifications. It utilizes robotic arms for component placement, laser guides for precision, and integrated vision systems for immediate quality inspection. This machine achieves a cycle time of under 35 seconds per green tire, significantly boosting overall line efficiency and reducing manual labor requirements. Key performance indicators include component concentricity and ply overlap accuracy.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 2/Smart Tire Machine P1
full_text: Smart Tire Machine P1 - A highly automated, modular tire building machine designed for rapid changeovers between different tire specifications. It utilizes robotic arms for component placement, laser guides for precision, and integrated vision systems for immediate quality inspection. This machine achieves a cycle time of under 35 seconds per green tire, significantly boosting overall line efficiency and reducing manual labor requirements. Key performance indicators include component concentricity and ply overlap accuracy.

name: TUM R&D
description: A specialized Tire Uniformity Machine used primarily for research and development, allowing for extremely precise measurements beyond standard production checks. It can simulate various road conditions and apply dynamic loads to assess tire performance characteristics under stress, providing valuable data for new tire designs and material evaluations. This machine helps engineers optimize tire geometry for reduced rolling resistance and enhanced grip.
path: Smart Tire Production/Devices/TUM R&D
full_text: TUM R&D - A specialized Tire Uniformity Machine used primarily for research and development, allowing for extremely precise measurements beyond standard production checks. It can simulate various road conditions and apply dynamic loads to assess tire performance characteristics under stress, providing valuable data for new tire designs and material evaluations. This machine helps engineers optimize tire geometry for reduced rolling resistance and enhanced grip.

name: AGV Fleet Control
description: The central control system managing a fleet of 20 Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs) responsible for material transport within Production Site A. This system optimizes routes, manages charging schedules, and coordinates material delivery to and from production lines, warehouses, and mixing areas. It uses real-time traffic data and integrates with the overall ERP system to ensure seamless, just-in-time material flow, significantly reducing manual forklift operations and improving safety.

It uses real-time traffic data and integrates with the overall ERP system to ensure seamless, just-in-time material flow, significantly reducing manual forklift operations and improving safety.

This system incorporates natural gas and biomass co-firing capabilities, aiming to reduce carbon footprint. It features advanced sensor arrays for real-time monitoring of pressure, temperature, and emissions, with automated controls ensuring consistent steam supply and energy optimization. Regular maintenance is scheduled to maximize uptime and efficiency.

name: Smart Tire Machine B4
description: This is a state-of-the-art radial tire building machine, operating at a cycle time of approximately 35 seconds per green tire. It features a multi-component feeding system with automated splice recognition and an integrated green tire weighing station. Advanced sensor fusion technology monitors material tension and alignment in real-time, feeding predictive maintenance algorithms to minimize downtime and ensure consistent product quality, particularly for run-flat tire designs.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site B/Tire Production Line 2/Smart Tire Machine B4
full_text: Smart Tire Machine B4 - This is a state-of-the-art radial tire building machine, operating at a cycle time of approximately 35 seconds per green tire. It features a multi-component feeding system with automated splice recognition and an integrated green tire weighing station. Advanced sensor fusion technology monitors material tension and alignment in real-time, feeding predictive maintenance algorithms to minimize downtime and ensure consistent product quality, particularly for run-flat tire designs.

name: VMI MAXX A2
description: The VMI MAXX A2 is a high-performance, single-stage tire building machine, specifically configured for rapid changeovers between different tire sizes and constructions, crucial for Just-In-Time production. It incorporates a fully automated component transfer system and an advanced HMI with real-time process visualization. This machine is pivotal for producing ultra-high-performance and electric vehicle specific tires, requiring extreme precision in ply and belt placement to meet stringent uniformity and noise reduction targets.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 1/VMI MAXX A2
full_text: VMI MAXX A2 - The VMI MAXX A2 is a high-performance, single-stage tire building machine, specifically configured for rapid changeovers between different tire sizes and constructions, crucial for Just-In-Time production. It incorporates a fully automated component transfer system and an advanced HMI with real-time process visualization. This machine is pivotal for producing ultra-high-performance and electric vehicle specific tires, requiring extreme precision in ply and belt placement to meet stringent uniformity and noise reduction targets.

name: TUM A1
description: This Tire Uniformity Machine is critical for the final quality assurance of all passenger car tires produced on Line 1. It conducts a comprehensive suite of tests including radial force variation, lateral force variation, conicity, ply steer, and dynamic imbalance at speeds up to 120 km/h. Equipped with a high-resolution laser profiler, it detects microscopic surface irregularities and provides detailed data logs for each tire, which are then used for statistical process control and identifying potential issues upstream in the manufacturing process.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 1/TUM A1
full_text: TUM A1 - This Tire Uniformity Machine is critical for the final quality assurance of all passenger car tires produced on Line 1. It conducts a comprehensive suite of tests including radial force variation, lateral force variation, conicity, ply steer, and dynamic imbalance at speeds up to 120 km/h. Equipped with a high-resolution laser profiler, it detects microscopic surface irregularities and provides detailed data logs for each tire, which are then used for statistical process control and identifying potential issues upstream in the manufacturing process.

name: Mixer Delta
description: A large capacity internal mixer, specifically a Banbury-type, used for the primary compounding of base rubber formulations. It handles up to 500 kg batches and operates with precise temperature and pressure control to achieve optimal dispersion of fillers and additives. Integrated with a fully automated weighing and feeding system, it ensures batch consistency and traceability. This mixer is equipped with advanced energy monitoring to optimize its operational efficiency and reduce power consumption during the intensive mixing cycles.
path: Smart Tire Production/Mixing Department/Mixer Delta
full_text: Mixer Delta - A large capacity internal mixer, specifically a Banbury-type, used for the primary compounding of base rubber formulations. It handles up to 500 kg batches and operates with precise temperature and pressure control to achieve optimal dispersion of fillers and additives. Integrated with a fully automated weighing and feeding system, it ensures batch consistency and traceability. This mixer is equipped with advanced energy monitoring to optimize its operational efficiency and reduce power consumption during the intensive mixing cycles.

name: Curing Press 8
description: A segmented mold curing press designed for efficient and uniform vulcanization of large truck and bus tires. This press features individual temperature control zones for the tread, sidewall, and bead areas, ensuring optimal curing without over- or under-curing any section. It employs a two-stage inflation system for gradual pressure application and is equipped with an automatic tire extraction mechanism, minimizing manual handling and improving cycle times. Predictive maintenance sensors monitor hydraulic pressure and mold temperatures to prevent unplanned downtime.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site B/Tire Production Line 3/Curing Press 8
full_text: Curing Press 8 - A segmented mold curing press designed for efficient and uniform vulcanization of large truck and bus tires. This press features individual temperature control zones for the tread, sidewall, and bead areas, ensuring optimal curing without over- or under-curing any section. It employs a two-stage inflation system for gradual pressure application and is equipped with an automatic tire extraction mechanism, minimizing manual handling and improving cycle times. Predictive maintenance sensors monitor hydraulic pressure and mold temperatures to prevent unplanned downtime.

name: Logistics AGV 10
description: Part of the advanced internal logistics system, this AGV is specifically designed to transport finished tire pallets from the end-of-line quality control area to the warehouse. It navigates using laser-based SLAM technology, operates autonomously, and integrates with the WMS to optimize routing and avoid congestion. With a payload capacity of 1500 kg and inductive charging capabilities, it ensures continuous operation across shifts, significantly reducing forklift traffic and improving safety within the facility.

name: TUM 1

name: Tire Uniformity Machine (TUM) 1
description: Advanced post-curing inspection device. It measures critical parameters such as radial force variation (RFV), lateral force variation (LFV), and conicity by simulating road conditions. Integrated with data analytics for root cause analysis.

name: Smart Tire Machine 1
description: This cutting-edge Smart Tire Machine automatically assembles all 'green tire' components (liner, beads, sidewalls, tread) onto a building drum. Connectivity to the cloud enables remote diagnostics and software updates, supporting Industry 4.0 principles.

Results from each tire are automatically recorded and compared against strict tolerances, with non-conforming tires flagged for further inspection or rejection. It's a critical checkpoint for ensuring product quality and customer satisfaction.

name: Smart Tire Machine P1
description: A fully automated tire building machine designed for high-volume production of premium performance tires. It utilizes robotic arms for component placement, laser scanning for precision alignment, and integrated sensors for real-time quality monitoring. The machine is capable of assembling complex green tire structures with minimal human intervention, ensuring exceptional uniformity and reduced material waste. Data from each build cycle is fed into an AI system for continuous process improvement.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 1/Smart Tire Machine P1
full_text: Smart Tire Machine P1 - A fully automated tire building machine designed for high-volume production of premium performance tires. It utilizes robotic arms for component placement, laser scanning for precision alignment, and integrated sensors for real-time quality monitoring. The machine is capable of assembling complex green tire structures with minimal human intervention, ensuring exceptional uniformity and reduced material waste. Data from each build cycle is fed into an AI system for continuous process improvement.

name: Curing Press Bank 7
description: A bank of 20 modern curing presses, each equipped with individual temperature and pressure control systems, operating in a parallel processing configuration. These presses are critical for the vulcanization process, where green tires are transformed into durable, functional tires through precisely controlled heat and pressure application. Advanced telemetry data from each press, including mold temperature, internal pressure, and cycle time, is continuously monitored and analyzed to prevent defects and optimize energy consumption. It is a major energy consumer and bottleneck, hence its critical monitoring.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site B/Tire Production Line 3/Curing Press Bank 7
full_text: Curing Press Bank 7 - A bank of 20 modern curing presses, each equipped with individual temperature and pressure control systems, operating in a parallel processing configuration. These presses are critical for the vulcanization process, where green tires are transformed into durable, functional tires through precisely controlled heat and pressure application. Advanced telemetry data from each press, including mold temperature, internal pressure, and cycle time, is continuously monitored and analyzed to prevent defects and optimize energy consumption. It is a major energy consumer and bottleneck, hence its critical monitoring.

name: TUM Final Inspection
description: The state-of-the-art Tire Uniformity Machine dedicated to the final inspection of all finished tires before warehousing. It performs comprehensive measurements including radial and lateral force variation, conicity, ply steer, and dynamic balance, identifying even microscopic imperfections. Integrated high-speed cameras also conduct visual inspections for surface defects. Any tire failing to meet the stringent quality standards is automatically flagged and diverted for further analysis, ensuring only top-quality products reach the market.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 1/TUM Final Inspection
full_text: TUM Final Inspection - The state-of-the-art Tire Uniformity Machine dedicated to the final inspection of all finished tires before warehousing. It performs comprehensive measurements including radial and lateral force variation, conicity, ply steer, and dynamic balance, identifying even microscopic imperfections. Integrated high-speed cameras also conduct visual inspections for surface defects. Any tire failing to meet the stringent quality standards is automatically flagged and diverted for further analysis, ensuring only top-quality products reach the market.

name: Mixing Department Central
description: The central hub for elastomer compounding, utilizing a fleet of highly specialized internal mixers and two-roll mills. This department is responsible for precise ingredient dosage, mixing sequence optimization, and temperature profiling to produce a wide range of rubber compounds tailored for specific tire applications (tread, sidewall, innerliner). Real-time rheological data is collected during mixing to ensure compound consistency and dispersibility, directly impacting the final tire's performance, longevity, and safety characteristics. Environmental controls maintain optimal conditions for material handling.
path: Smart Tire Production/Mixing Department Central
full_text: Mixing Department Central - The central hub for elastomer compounding, utilizing a fleet of highly specialized internal mixers and two-roll mills. This department is responsible for precise ingredient dosage, mixing sequence optimization, and temperature profiling to produce a wide range of rubber compounds tailored for specific tire applications (tread, sidewall, innerliner). Real-time rheological data is collected during mixing to ensure compound consistency and dispersibility, directly impacting the final tire's performance, longevity, and safety characteristics. Environmental controls maintain optimal conditions for material handling.

name: VMI EDGER Line A
description: An advanced VMI EDGER machine integrated into Production Line A, specifically designed for preparing multi-ply rubber and textile components with extreme precision. It features an automated loading system, high-speed cutting blades, and vision inspection for dimensional accuracy and edge quality. This machine ensures that all individual components, such as body plies and cap plies, are cut to exact specifications, which is crucial for achieving tire uniformity and structural integrity during the tire building process. Its high throughput supports rapid component supply for subsequent stages.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 1/VMI EDGER Line A
full_text: VMI EDGER Line A - An advanced VMI EDGER machine integrated into Production Line A, specifically designed for preparing multi-ply rubber and textile components with extreme precision. This machine ensures that all individual components, such as body plies and cap plies, are cut to exact specifications, which is crucial for achieving tire uniformity and structural integrity during the tire building process. Its high throughput supports rapid component supply for subsequent stages.

name: Boiler Plant Main
description: The primary industrial boiler system responsible for generating high-pressure steam crucial for the vulcanization (curing) process and providing heat to various other departments like the mixing area. This plant comprises two large natural gas-fired boilers, each with a capacity of 150,000 lbs/hr, operating redundantly to ensure uninterrupted steam supply. It features advanced emissions control, real-time energy monitoring, and automated safety systems to comply with environmental regulations and ensure operational efficiency. The steam generated is distributed through an extensive network of insulated pipes across the entire production site.

description: This is a state-of-the-art Smart Tire Machine responsible for the precise assembly of all uncured rubber components into a 'Green Tire'. It utilizes advanced laser guidance and robotic manipulators to ensure concentricity and ply overlap accuracy. The machine operates on a discrete cycle basis, completing a tire approximately every 45 seconds, with key performance indicators centered around tension control and material alignment to prevent uniformity issues in the final product. It integrates with upstream component preparation and feeds directly into the curing presses.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 1/Green Tire Assembly Line 1
full_text: Green Tire Assembly Line 1 - This is a state-of-the-art Smart Tire Machine responsible for the precise assembly of all uncured rubber components into a 'Green Tire'. It utilizes advanced laser guidance and robotic manipulators to ensure concentricity and ply overlap accuracy. The machine operates on a discrete cycle basis, completing a tire approximately every 45 seconds, with key performance indicators centered around tension control and material alignment to prevent uniformity issues in the final product. It integrates with upstream component preparation and feeds directly into the curing presses.

name: Curing Press Block B
description: This block comprises 12 parallel vulcanization presses, forming a critical bottleneck in the tire production process. Each press applies specific heat and pressure profiles to transform 'Green Tires' into finished, cured products. Advanced process control systems monitor temperature, time, and pressure for each individual tire, ensuring optimal material properties and structural integrity. Preventative maintenance schedules are rigorously followed to maximize uptime and product consistency, as any deviation here can lead to significant scrap rates.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site B/Tire Production Line 3/Curing Press Block B
full_text: Curing Press Block B - This block comprises 12 parallel vulcanization presses, forming a critical bottleneck in the tire production process. Each press applies specific heat and pressure profiles to transform 'Green Tires' into finished, cured products. Advanced process control systems monitor temperature, time, and pressure for each individual tire, ensuring optimal material properties and structural integrity. Preventative maintenance schedules are rigorously followed to maximize uptime and product consistency, as any deviation here can lead to significant scrap rates.

name: Final Inspection TUM 2
description: The Tire Uniformity Machine (TUM) at the final inspection stage is crucial for guaranteeing product quality before shipment. It measures critical parameters such as radial force variation, lateral force variation, conicity, and ply steer, identifying any subtle imperfections that could affect vehicle handling or ride comfort. This machine is equipped with high-resolution sensors and integrates with a data analytics platform to provide real-time feedback to upstream production stages, enabling continuous process improvement and minimizing defects. Each tire undergoes a full 360-degree scan and spin test.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 2/Final Inspection TUM 2
full_text: Final Inspection TUM 2 - The Tire Uniformity Machine (TUM) at the final inspection stage is crucial for guaranteeing product quality before shipment. It measures critical parameters such as radial force variation, lateral force variation, conicity, and ply steer, identifying any subtle imperfections that could affect vehicle handling or ride comfort. This machine is equipped with high-resolution sensors and integrates with a data analytics platform to provide real-time feedback to upstream production stages, enabling continuous process improvement and minimizing defects. Each tire undergoes a full 360-degree scan and spin test.

name: Banbury Mixer X1000
description: This heavy-duty Banbury Mixer is the workhorse of the mixing department, responsible for the initial compounding of raw rubber with carbon black, oils, and other chemicals. It operates in batches, applying intense shear and heat to achieve a homogeneous blend, which is then cooled and sheeted. The mixer's performance is critical to the final properties of the tire compound, influencing everything from wear resistance to rolling efficiency. An integrated control system precisely manages mixing cycles, temperature profiles, and power consumption to ensure consistent material quality and energy efficiency.
path: Smart Tire Production/Mixing Department/Banbury Mixer X1000
full_text: Banbury Mixer X1000 - This heavy-duty Banbury Mixer is the workhorse of the mixing department, responsible for the initial compounding of raw rubber with carbon black, oils, and other chemicals. The mixer's performance is critical to the final properties of the tire compound, influencing everything from wear resistance to rolling efficiency. An integrated control system precisely manages mixing cycles, temperature profiles, and power consumption to ensure consistent material quality and energy efficiency.

name: Smart Production Line 2
description: This automated production line is designed for high-volume manufacturing of passenger car tires, integrating smart machines, robotic automation, and advanced sensor technology throughout its stages. From green tire assembly to curing and final inspection, every step is monitored and controlled by a central Manufacturing Execution System (MES). It features real-time anomaly detection, predictive maintenance capabilities, and adaptive control algorithms that optimize throughput and minimize waste. The line is capable of producing a variety of tire sizes and specifications with minimal manual intervention, aiming for zero defects.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Smart Production Line 2

It features real-time anomaly detection, predictive maintenance capabilities, and adaptive control algorithms that optimize throughput and minimize waste. The line is capable of producing a variety of tire sizes and specifications with minimal manual intervention, aiming for zero defects.

name: Global Distribution Center
description: Serving as the primary global logistics hub, this facility manages the storage, sorting, and distribution of all finished tires for worldwide shipment. It employs an advanced Warehouse Management System (WMS) that optimizes inventory levels, routes outbound shipments, and tracks every product from production to delivery. Automated storage and retrieval systems (AS/RS), coupled with a fleet of autonomous guided vehicles (AGVs), ensure efficient material flow within the vast facility. This center is crucial for meeting customer demand and maintaining supply chain agility in a competitive market.

The site is committed to sustainability, employing energy-efficient machinery and waste reduction programs. Its expansive layout accommodates future expansion and supports the production of a diverse range of tire types, from passenger car to light truck tires, serving various global markets.

name: Central Mixing Plant
description: The heart of rubber compound preparation, this department houses a series of Banbury mixers and two-roll mills. Raw materials like natural rubber, synthetic rubber, carbon black, and various chemicals are precisely weighed, blended, and homogenized here to create specific rubber compounds tailored for different tire components (tread, sidewall, bead). Temperature control during mixing is paramount to prevent premature vulcanization.
path: Smart Tire Production/Mixing Department/Central Mixing Plant
full_text: Central Mixing Plant - The heart of rubber compound preparation, this department houses a series of Banbury mixers and two-roll mills. Raw materials like natural rubber, synthetic rubber, carbon black, and various chemicals are precisely weighed, blended, and homogenized here to create specific rubber compounds tailored for different tire components (tread, sidewall, bead). Temperature control during mixing is paramount to prevent premature vulcanization.

name: Smart Tire Machine 3
description: This next-generation tire building machine is fully automated, constructing a complete green tire from multiple rubber and textile components. It employs laser-guided placement, tension-controlled winding, and real-time vision systems to ensure precise component alignment and minimize defects. The machine's predictive maintenance capabilities monitor wear on critical parts, allowing for scheduled interventions and maximizing uptime. Each cycle completes a tire in approximately 35-45 seconds.

Each cycle completes a tire in approximately 35-45 seconds.

name: Site A - Power Boiler
description: A high-capacity industrial boiler system providing superheated steam to multiple curing presses and process heating units across Production Site A. It operates on natural gas, with backup heavy fuel oil capabilities, and features advanced emissions control technology. Critical parameters monitored include steam pressure, temperature, and fuel consumption, ensuring efficient energy delivery to sustain continuous production operations while adhering to environmental regulations.

name: AGV Fleet 1
description: A fleet of 10 automated guided vehicles (AGVs) responsible for internal material transport across Production Site A. These intelligent robots autonomously move raw materials from storage to mixing, green tires from building machines to curing presses, and finished tires to the quality control and warehouse areas. They navigate using a combination of laser guidance and magnetic strips, optimizing routes in real-time to avoid congestion and ensuring just-in-time material delivery, significantly reducing manual labor and increasing operational safety.
path: Smart Tire Production/Logistics/AGV Fleet 1
full_text: AGV Fleet 1 - A fleet of 10 automated guided vehicles (AGVs) responsible for internal material transport across Production Site A. They navigate using a combination of laser guidance and magnetic strips, optimizing routes in real-time to avoid congestion and ensuring just-in-time material delivery, significantly reducing manual labor and increasing operational safety.

name: TUM Main Testing Bay
description: This advanced Tire Uniformity Machine is the final quality gate for all tires produced on Line 1. It measures radial force variation, lateral force variation, conicity, and ply steer, identifying any imbalances or irregularities that could affect vehicle handling or ride comfort. Integrated with a data analytics platform, it provides immediate feedback to upstream processes, allowing for rapid adjustments to building or curing parameters to prevent further defects. Tires failing these stringent tests are automatically flagged for rework or rejection.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 1/TUM Main Testing Bay
full_text: TUM Main Testing Bay - This advanced Tire Uniformity Machine is the final quality gate for all tires produced on Line 1. Integrated with a data analytics platform, it provides immediate feedback to upstream processes, allowing for rapid adjustments to building or curing parameters to prevent further defects. Tires failing these stringent tests are automatically flagged for rework or rejection.

name: VMI MAXX Prime
description: The VMI MAXX Prime represents the pinnacle of single-stage tire building technology. It integrates all components from bead application to tread attachment into a single, highly synchronized process, drastically reducing cycle times and improving tire uniformity. Equipped with a comprehensive suite of IoT sensors, it provides real-time data on component tension, alignment, and temperature, feeding into a central control system that autonomously optimizes parameters for different tire SKUs. This machine is crucial for high-volume production of premium performance tires.

name: Curing Press 2
description: A sophisticated segmented mold curing press used for vulcanizing larger diameter tires, typically for light trucks and SUVs. It applies precise heat and pressure profiles according to specific tire recipes, ensuring optimal rubber compound cross-linking and tread pattern formation. The press incorporates predictive maintenance sensors to monitor internal temperatures, hydraulic pressures, and cycle times, alerting operators to potential issues before they cause downtime. Energy recovery systems are also integrated to capture waste heat.

name: Smart Tire Machine 1
description: High-speed discrete automation asset that assembles 'Green Tires' from uncured rubber components, including the inner liner, body plies, bead assemblies, and tread. Process Type: Discrete, Cycle-based (~40s). Key Physics: Tension control and mechanical alignment determine tire uniformity. It features AI-powered vision systems for component verification and real-time adjustments, significantly reducing defects and improving first-pass yield. Operators monitor performance via a centralized HMI, which also provides comprehensive diagnostics.

It features AI-powered vision systems for component verification and real-time adjustments, significantly reducing defects and improving first-pass yield. Operators monitor performance via a centralized HMI, which also provides comprehensive diagnostics.

name: Mixer 1
description: A Banbury internal mixer, model F-450, used for compounding critical rubber formulations such as tread and sidewall compounds. The mixing process is highly energy-intensive but optimized for throughput and compound quality, with integrated sensors providing real-time viscosity and temperature data. Automatic ingredient dosing systems minimize human error.

name: Mixer 3
description: This is a tandem-mixer setup designed for two-stage rubber compounding. The first stage focuses on dispersion of fillers and chemicals, while the second stage, operating at a lower temperature, incorporates curatives to prevent premature vulcanization. It includes automated feeding systems for precise ingredient dosing and energy monitoring for process optimization, critical for achieving specific material properties.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site B/Mixing Department B/Mixer 3
full_text: Mixer 3 - This is a tandem-mixer setup designed for two-stage rubber compounding. The first stage focuses on dispersion of fillers and chemicals, while the second stage, operating at a lower temperature, incorporates curatives to prevent premature vulcanization. It includes automated feeding systems for precise ingredient dosing and energy monitoring for process optimization, critical for achieving specific material properties.

name: Curing Press 6
description: A segment-type curing press, optimized for large radial truck tires. It features independent platen heating zones for uniform temperature distribution, a bladder inflation system that precisely shapes the tire during vulcanization, and an automatic tire ejection mechanism. Integrated sensors monitor internal mold temperature and pressure, allowing for adaptive curing cycles to minimize defects and energy consumption.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site B/Tire Production Line 3/Curing Press 6
full_text: Curing Press 6 - A segment-type curing press, optimized for large radial truck tires. Integrated sensors monitor internal mold temperature and pressure, allowing for adaptive curing cycles to minimize defects and energy consumption.

name: AGV 102

name: Boiler System B

Energy consumption is closely monitored for efficiency.

name: TUM 202

It's crucial for high-end tire certification.

name: Smart Tire Machine B1
description: This advanced discrete automation asset is the heart of the green tire assembly process. It precisely combines multiple uncured rubber components—innerliner, plies, belts, bead wires, sidewalls, and tread—into a cohesive green tire. Key operational physics involve maintaining precise tension control and mechanical alignment of components to ensure tire uniformity and balance. The machine operates on a cycle-based process, completing a green tire assembly in approximately 35-45 seconds, depending on the tire size and complexity. Integrated sensors provide real-time feedback on component placement and adhesion, minimizing defects early in the production cycle.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site B/Tire Production Line 1/Smart Tire Machine B1
full_text: Smart Tire Machine B1 - This advanced discrete automation asset is the heart of the green tire assembly process. It precisely combines multiple uncured rubber components—innerliner, plies, belts, bead wires, sidewalls, and tread—into a cohesive green tire. Key operational physics involve maintaining precise tension control and mechanical alignment of components to ensure tire uniformity and balance. The machine operates on a cycle-based process, completing a green tire assembly in approximately 35-45 seconds, depending on the tire size and complexity. Integrated sensors provide real-time feedback on component placement and adhesion, minimizing defects early in the production cycle.

name: Curing Press 5
description: This is a key component in the vulcanization process, transforming a 'green tire' into its final, durable form. The press applies specific heat and pressure profiles, which are precisely controlled to polymerize the rubber compounds, giving the tire its elasticity, strength, and tread pattern. It operates as part of a parallel processing bank, with each press handling one tire at a time. The process typically takes between 10-20 minutes, depending on the tire type. Automated loading and unloading systems ensure a continuous flow, and integrated sensors monitor temperature and pressure deviations to guarantee consistent quality and prevent under or over-curing, which can significantly impact tire performance and lifespan.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site B/Tire Production Line 2/Curing Press 5
full_text: Curing Press 5 - This is a key component in the vulcanization process, transforming a 'green tire' into its final, durable form. The press applies specific heat and pressure profiles, which are precisely controlled to polymerize the rubber compounds, giving the tire its elasticity, strength, and tread pattern. It operates as part of a parallel processing bank, with each press handling one tire at a time. The process typically takes between 10-20 minutes, depending on the tire type. Automated loading and unloading systems ensure a continuous flow, and integrated sensors monitor temperature and pressure deviations to guarantee consistent quality and prevent under or over-curing, which can significantly impact tire performance and lifespan.

name: Mixer 4 - Tandem Line
description: A sophisticated two-stage mixer designed for high-volume, high-quality rubber compounding. The first stage, a Banbury-type internal mixer, thoroughly blends raw rubber with carbon black and other reinforcing fillers at high temperatures to achieve basic dispersion. The second stage, an open mill or a different internal mixer, incorporates curatives and other processing aids at lower temperatures to prevent premature vulcanization. This tandem setup allows for precise control over mixing parameters, ensuring optimal compound homogeneity, which is critical for the final tire's performance, durability, and rolling resistance. Automated weighing and feeding systems minimize human error and ensure batch consistency.
path: Smart Tire Production/Mixing Department/Mixer 4 - Tandem Line
full_text: Mixer 4 - Tandem Line - A sophisticated two-stage mixer designed for high-volume, high-quality rubber compounding. The second stage, an open mill or a different internal mixer, incorporates curatives and other processing aids at lower temperatures to prevent premature vulcanization. This tandem setup allows for precise control over mixing parameters, ensuring optimal compound homogeneity, which is critical for the final tire's performance, durability, and rolling resistance. Automated weighing and feeding systems minimize human error and ensure batch consistency.

name: Tire Uniformity Machine (TUM) 2
description: This critical post-curing inspection device measures the force variation, balance, and run-out of finished tires. The TUM applies radial, lateral, and tangential forces to a rotating tire to detect any irregularities that could affect ride comfort, handling, or safety. High-precision sensors capture minute deviations, and sophisticated software analyzes the data to identify issues such as out-of-roundness, imbalance, or stiffness variations. Tires failing to meet strict quality thresholds are flagged for further analysis or rejection. This machine is indispensable for ensuring premium product quality and customer satisfaction, often operating at high throughput rates to match production line speeds.

name: Curing Press 1
description: A bank of 12 independent hydraulic curing presses, responsible for the vulcanization stage of tire manufacturing. Each press applies specific heat and pressure profiles based on the tire's compound and size, transforming the raw 'green tire' into its final durable form. This section is a major energy consumer and is equipped with advanced temperature and pressure sensors for process control and energy optimization.

name: Smart Tire Machine 1
description: An advanced, fully automated tire building machine responsible for assembling the multi-component 'green tire'. It precisely layers beads, plies, belts, and tread strips onto a building drum, using robotic manipulators and vision systems for alignment. This machine is critical for tire uniformity and balance, operating with sub-millimeter precision and integrated with a material delivery system for continuous operation.

name: Tire Uniformity Machine (TUM) 1
description: A critical quality control station located at the end of the production line, used to measure key performance indicators like radial force variation, lateral force variation, and conicity. Tires are mounted and rotated against a load wheel, simulating road conditions. Data from the TUM is used to classify tires, identify manufacturing inconsistencies, and provide feedback for process adjustments upstream.

name: Compound Mixing Center
description: The heart of rubber preparation, where various polymers, carbon black, silica, and chemical additives are precisely weighed and blended in large internal mixers. This department operates under strict environmental controls to manage dust and fumes. It employs advanced analytical techniques, including rheometers and viscometers, to ensure each batch of rubber compound meets specific formulation requirements for performance, durability, and grip. It employs advanced analytical techniques, including rheometers and viscometers, to ensure each batch of rubber compound meets specific formulation requirements for performance, durability, and grip. Automated dispensing systems minimize human error.

name: Production Line Eco-Track
description: A fully integrated production line dedicated to manufacturing environmentally friendly tires with reduced rolling resistance and extended tread life. It incorporates specialized tire building machines that handle unique compound formulations and utilizes low-temperature curing processes. Real-time energy monitoring systems track consumption at each stage, aiming for zero waste. AI-driven quality control checks at every step ensure compliance with rigorous environmental and performance standards, making it a benchmark for green manufacturing.

name: Smart Curing Press 10
description: A state-of-the-art hydraulic curing press featuring multi-zone temperature control and adaptive pressure profiles. It uses precise vulcanization parameters based on the specific tire type and compound, reducing cure time while enhancing tire uniformity and durability. Integrated with a central control system, it monitors steam consumption and rejects, providing diagnostic data for predictive maintenance. Its energy recovery system contributes to overall plant efficiency.

name: Digital Tire Builder 5000
description: This advanced Smart Tire Machine is a fully automated, robotic work cell capable of assembling complex green tires with exceptional precision and repeatability. It utilizes laser guidance systems for component placement and real-time vision inspection to detect micro-defects during the build process. Its modular design allows for rapid changeovers between different tire specifications, minimizing downtime. Data collected during the build (tension, alignment, material consumption) is fed into a central database for traceability and continuous process improvement, ensuring optimal tire geometry and uniformity.

Its battery management system allows for quick charging during operational downtimes.

name: VMI EDGER 1
description: The VMI EDGER 1 is a specialized machine designed for the precise cutting and splicing of uncured rubber components, particularly for tread and sidewall segments. It uses advanced optical sensors to detect material edges and automated robotic arms for accurate placement, ensuring seamless joins and consistent component dimensions. This precision is critical for preventing internal defects in the final tire and for achieving optimal uniformity and balance. The machine is fully integrated into the smart factory network, providing live data on material usage and cutting accuracy.

name: Mixer 202
description: A highly advanced tangenital mixer, Mixer 202 is pivotal for developing specialized rubber compounds for ultra-high performance tires. It features variable rotor speeds, precise temperature control, and a sophisticated dust collection system to manage fine particles. The mixing cycle is fully automated and monitored by AI-driven algorithms to ensure optimal dispersion of ingredients and consistency of material properties, which are crucial for achieving specific tire characteristics like grip, wear resistance, and fuel efficiency. It has a batch capacity of 300 kg and can complete a full cycle in under 8 minutes.

name: TUM 1 (Detailed)
description: The primary Tire Uniformity Machine for final quality checks, capable of measuring radial force variation, lateral force variation, conicity, and ply steer. It employs advanced load wheels and sensors to simulate road conditions, identifying even minute imperfections that could affect vehicle handling or ride comfort. Data from this machine is fed back to the building machines for process optimization, contributing to a closed-loop quality system. Its high throughput allows it to keep pace with the production line's output.

name: Mixer 2
description: A state-of-the-art internal mixer with a 300-liter capacity, utilizing variable speed rotors and precise temperature control. name: TUM Main Test Rig
description: A sophisticated Tire Uniformity Machine (TUM) serving as the final quality gate for all tires produced on Line 1. Data from this machine is fed back to upstream processes for continuous improvement and quality assurance, ensuring compliance with global automotive standards.

name: Tire Uniformity Machine (TUM) Apex
description: The flagship Tire Uniformity Machine, performing comprehensive dynamic tests on finished tires. It precisely measures force variation, radial and lateral run-out, and balance under simulated road conditions. Data from TUM Apex is fed back into upstream processes for continuous improvement, ensuring every tire meets stringent quality and performance standards before shipment. It's crucial for identifying subtle defects not visible to the naked eye.

name: Mixing Department A
description: This department is the heart of rubber compound preparation, featuring Banbury mixers and two-roll mills. It handles the precise formulation and blending of various rubber, carbon black, silica, and chemical additives according to proprietary recipes. Automated material handling systems minimize human error and maximize throughput.

name: Tire Uniformity Machine (TUM) 2
description: This state-of-the-art Tire Uniformity Machine performs dynamic testing on finished tires to measure radial force variation, lateral force variation, and conicity. It uses high-precision sensors and sophisticated algorithms to identify any imperfections in the tire's construction that could affect vehicle handling or ride comfort. Data from TUM 2 is fed back into the production line for continuous process improvement, ensuring every tire meets stringent quality standards before shipment.

full_text: Tire Uniformity Machine (TUM) 2 - This state-of-the-art Tire Uniformity Machine performs dynamic testing on finished tires to measure radial force variation, lateral force variation, and conicity. Data from TUM 2 is fed back into the production line for continuous process improvement, ensuring every tire meets stringent quality standards before shipment.

name: AGV 1
